Mimosa nut (Dipteryx alata) is a tropical tree native to the Amazon rainforest, whose seeds have been used for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Mimosa nut include its potential to treat digestive issues and skin problems, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent. The bioactive constituents of Mimosa nut include dipteryxin, dipteryxol, and other compounds that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
